title: The Eye of the Monocle
writer: Georges Lautner, Jacques Robert, Colonel Rémy
actors: Paul Meurisse, Elga Andersen, Gaia Germani
plot: In 1943, a German commando conceals a large quantity of gold in an undersea cave on the coast of Corsica. Years later, Schlumpf, the sole survivor of the commando, returns to Corsica to recuperate the treasure -- with British and ...
